# Portfolio Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

A Next.js 14 personal IT portfolio website with:

- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion animations
- shadcn/ui components
- Multi-language i18n (English + Vietnamese)
- Multi-theme (dark/light toggle)
- Sections: Hero, About Me, Skills, Projects, Experience, Education, Contact

## Development Guidelines

- Use TypeScript for all files
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Use Framer Motion for animations
- Use shadcn/ui for UI components
- Use next-intl for i18n
- Use next-themes for theme management
- Follow modern dark/light theme design

## Completed Steps

- [x] Created .github/copilot-instructions.md
